changelog: PERF: First release-mode build for Canada. APK size cut nearly in half (24 MB → 13 MB) thanks to R8 minification + resource shrinking. Debug-build perf overhead is gone.
PERF: Compose strong-skipping mode enabled — less recomposition jank when D-pad-scrolling through title rows and channel lists on Fire Stick.
PERF: ExoPlayer load-control retuned — channel zaps and Play taps feel snappier; back-buffer kept around so scrub-back in VOD is instant.

If anything looks off on your device please report it — release builds are aggressive about removing 'unused' code and we want to catch any edge cases early. You can roll back instantly from the agent panel.
